venue.tokyoCentralDesc: A minimalist and functional environment for maximum focus.
venue.shibuyaStudioDesc: An open workspace that inspires creative thinking.
venue.osakaHubDesc: A comfortable shared office space for business professionals.
venue.kyotoSpaceDesc: A quiet workspace where tradition meets modernity.
venue.experienceDesc: Step into a sanctuary designed for efficiency and tranquility. Tokyo Central Hub blends Japanese industrial aesthetics with cutting-edge ergonomics. Whether you seek deep focus in a quiet zone or creative collaboration in an open lounge, every detail reduces cognitive load and sparks inspiration. More than an office — a harbor for the modern professional.
venue.shibuyaExperienceDesc: An open studio space infused with Shibuya's energy and creativity. Sunlit lounges, movable partitions, and projector-equipped meeting areas optimize both teamwork and solo work.
venue.osakaExperienceDesc: A professional shared office in Osaka's business district. High-speed network, meeting rooms, and private booths — ideal for business trips and remote work.
venue.kyotoExperienceDesc: A serene workspace where Kyoto's traditional beauty meets modern design. Warm wood interiors, soundproof booths, and matcha hospitality help you focus with peace of mind.
venue.kyotoLocation: Shimogyo-ku, Karasuma-dori Shio-koji Sagaru, Shimogyo-ku, Kyoto
venue.bentoFocusDesc: A sanctuary for work requiring deep concentration. Soundproof panels and individual lighting controls let you tackle important tasks without distraction.
venue.bentoCollabDesc: A flexible, open co-working space. Multifunctional seating is ideal for brainstorming, workshops, and casual business networking.
venue.bentoCreativeDesc: An open lounge for turning ideas into reality. Whiteboard walls, projectors, and movable furniture maximize team creativity.
venue.bentoStudioDesc: An independent studio for small groups. Perfect for recording, streaming, and design reviews that need privacy.
venue.bentoBusinessDesc: A premium suite for business meetings. Large monitors, whiteboards, and café service support important negotiations.
venue.bentoTradDesc: A wa-modern space with tatami and low desks. A quiet zone ideal for reading, writing, and meditation.
venue.houseRule2: Please refrain from bringing in strong-smelling food
venue.houseRule3: Acts that cause trouble to other customers are prohibited

seat.activeOrderDesc:
You already have an ongoing reservation.
Please complete it before making a new one.

agreement.title: Terms of Service
agreement.heroTitle: Terms of Service and User Rights
agreement.section1Body:
Thank you for using FORWARD HUB.
Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using this reservation platform.
By creating an account, logging in, or using the Service, you are deemed to have understood and agreed to these Terms and related policies.
If you do not agree to these Terms, please refrain from registering an account or using the Service.
agreement.resp1Body: You are responsible for keeping the information provided during registration and booking accurate and up to date.
agreement.resp2Body: Please comply with reservation times, review cancellation policies, and follow facility usage rules.
agreement.resp3Body: Be considerate of other users and facility staff, and behave appropriately in a shared public space.
agreement.section3Body:
Protecting your privacy is an important responsibility for us.
FORWARD HUB collects and uses your information only as necessary to provide and operate the reservation service.
Except as required by law, we will not disclose or sell your personal information to third parties without your consent.
agreement.section4Body:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, FORWARD HUB shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or other damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service.
While we strive to operate the Service stably and securely, we do not guarantee that the Service will always be available, uninterrupted, error-free, or fully meet users' expectations or purposes.
agreement.consent: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
